zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Knightley於大約1464年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利時，她的父親Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley39歲，母親Eleanor de Throckmorton41歲。她於1480年與Thomas Andrews II在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Knightley was born about 1464, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley, was 39 and her mother, Eleanor de Throckmorton, was 41. She married Thomas Andrews II in 1480, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She was buried in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England.

Elle a épousé Thomas Andrews II en 1480, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elleenterrée à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

ko.St John the Baptist, Royal Leamington Sp: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Emma Knightley(이)가 대략 1464년 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Throckmorton(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Thomas Andrews II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Knightley родилась около 1464 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Throckmorton, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Andrews II в 1480 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия.
